meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Speed Up Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with the Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly guide to shipping professional SaaS apps faster with Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready foundation, eliminating boilerplate and configuration headaches. By pairing this with Claude Code’s autonomous file manipulation, you can automate repetitive coding tasks, slash development time by 70%, and deliver high-quality, professional SaaS applications to your clients at lightning speed.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a relentless race against time. You have a vision, a demanding client, and a clock that never stops ticking. Yet, you find yourself trapped in the 'boilerplate abyss'—spending days configuring auth, databases, and project structures before writing a single line of business logic. This isn't just slow; it's a bottleneck that kills your profitability.

But what if you could bypass the setup phase entirely? Imagine launching a robust, scalable architecture in minutes rather than days. The Antigravity project template is the force multiplier you’ve been missing, turning hours of tedious configuration into a single, automated deployment process.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Clone the base template to establish a battle-tested architecture that handles routing, state, and API integration out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard SaaS template with authentication and database integration.

steps.title: Define Your Schema with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to interpret your business requirements and generate a normalized database schema compatible with the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my requirements for a multi-tenant project and update the Prisma schema to support users, subscriptions, and roles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles and subscription plans.'

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage Antigravity's internal generators to create CRUD endpoints without writing repetitive boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new feature module for 'Project Management' including API routes and type-safe frontend components.

steps.title: Implement Client-Specific Business Logic
steps.description: Direct Claude Code to inject specific logic into your generated controllers, ensuring your code remains clean and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication logic to support custom OAuth providers as requested by the client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Refactor auth controller to include custom OAuth provider integration based on project specs.'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Finalize your deployment pipeline using the pre-configured scripts included in the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Check all environment variables and prepare the deployment configuration for a Vercel-ready production build.
steps.claude_code_command: npm run build && npm run deploy

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code when modifying core configuration files to prevent unwanted side effects.
Keep your schema changes atomic; commit your database migrations immediately after Claude generates the models.
Use Antigravity’s 'Component Library' to override default styles globally, ensuring client branding is applied in seconds.
Audit generated code with Claude Code by asking for a 'security and performance review' before pushing to main.
Maintain a custom 'Context File' that Claude Code can read to understand your preferred coding patterns and client-specific requirements.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit the build time and review the codebase for modularity. Start building a library of custom components that you can reuse across all future freelance projects to exponentially increase your speed.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the strategy to dominate your freelance projects. Stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
